name: Amtrak: Distance vs Travel Time
description: Distance (miles) vs travel time (minutes) for 16 Coast Starlight Amtrak segments. IMS Ch. 7.
studyDescription: Scheduled distances and travel times for 16 segments of the Amtrak Coast Starlight route, which runs from Seattle to Los Angeles along the US Pacific coast. This is an observational dataset based on Amtrak's published timetable.

variableDescriptions.dist: Distance of the route segment in miles
variableDescriptions.travel_time: Scheduled travel time for the segment in minutes

sourceDetail: OpenIntro IMS Ch. 7. Data from Amtrak Coast Starlight timetable, openintro::coast_starlight.

context.parameter: slope of travel time on distance

inferenceContexts.parameter: the population slope of the relationship between distance and travel time
inferenceContexts.claim: there is a positive linear relationship between distance and travel time on the Coast Starlight route
